Meaning: Equation IDs not matching expected naming
Tracks where labels are used (e.g. missing references, unused labels)
Every duplicated label occurrence (e.g. pdf linking and html anchors tracked)

References pointing to labels that do not exist.
Labels that exist but are never referenced. These may not necessarily be 'errors' but could be helpful if cleaning up 'dead' content or unused figures.

Registry of detected equation blocks. This tracks equation ID, visible customized ID, expected ID and determines if they match.

Condensed summary of duplicate equation IDs.
